top_signals.title: Why Trump’s Netanyahu Problem Is Hurdle to Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump has spent months projecting confidence that a deal to end the Iran conflict is within reach, but Israel's determination to press ahead with its own objectives underscores his tenuous control over the outcome of the crisis. Bloomberg's Michael Heath has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed Warned on Shrinking Balance Sheet in Lookback at Powell Era - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Fed Warned on Shrinking Balance Sheet in Lookback at Powell Era  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asian Stock Edge Up to Record, Yen Trades Near 160: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks followed Wall Street higher as renewed enthusiasm for the artificial-intelligence trade drove US equities to records. The yen hovered near 160 per dollar.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Yen back at ¥160 to the dollar about a month after massive intervention
top_signals.summary: The currency is now near the level that some traders believe is the red line for the government and will lead to another major effort to prop up the currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Top U.S. spy agencies feud over turf, mission
top_signals.summary: The infighting between the CIA and the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) has flared for more than a year.
